name: v0.18.0
body:
## What's Changed
* feat(web): render markdown in activity detail description and result (#166) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/172
* feat(web): add syntax highlighting to markdown code blocks (#170) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/173
* docs: update testing documentation for accuracy (#167) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/174
* feat: require JWT auth on all API endpoints when Supabase is enabled (#162) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/175
* feat(web): replace UI icons with Fluent design icons (#168) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/176
* feat(web): add subtle background gradients for depth and polish (#169) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/177
* feat(web): make web app mobile responsive (#171) by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/178
* fix(web): use bound paths prop to avoid duplicate attribute parse error by @michaeljolley in https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/pull/179


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/michaeljolley/io/compare/v0.17.2...v0.18.0
